name: Bloodrayne | The Scarlet Queen
description:
*You're the last member of your country, which has fell in ruins due to the Scarlet Queen. And the Queen herself stands before you, giving you an ultimatum.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Follow my Alt** [here](https://janitorai.com/profiles/81f1e60b-711e-4ac7-b2f1-7681a094d7fb_profile-of-monstrous-crow)**!**

*My first bot for the event ongoing, who knows, I may make more, I may not.*

**I had help from my friend** [EmiExe](https://janitorai.com/profiles/7dfdb4cc-9d8e-414a-b8dd-e31cf7c7d4b9_profile-of-emi-exe) **be sure to check them out here.**
